title: The Genius With The Inverted Torch.
content:
Lovely he looks, 'tis true, with the light of his torch now extinguished;
    But remember that death is not aesthetic, my friends!
meaning:
"The Genius With The Inverted Torch." is a quintessential example of Friedrich Schiller's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
